Summary of the **pymcaf** package layout:

---

## 1. Project Layout

**Workspace root:** `/Users/greg/projects/microchip/pyx2ctune/`

```
pyx2ctune/
├── pyproject.toml              # Root project (mctoolbox) - depends on pymcaf
├── mctoolbox/                  # GUI app that depends on pymcaf
├── packages/
│   └── pymcaf/                # pymcaf package
│       ├── pyproject.toml
│       ├── docs/               # Sphinx docs
│       │   ├── conf.py
│       │   ├── index.rst
│       │   ├── Makefile
│       │   ├── make.bat
│       │   ├── installation.rst
│       │   ├── quickstart.rst
│       │   ├── api/            # API reference
│       │   │   ├── index.rst
│       │   │   ├── backend.rst, backends.rst
│       │   │   ├── connection.rst, constants.rst
│       │   │   ├── motor.rst, parameters.rst
│       │   │   ├── scope.rst, test_harness.rst, types.rst
│       │   └── guide/          # User guides
│       │       ├── index.rst
│       │       ├── connection.rst, motor.rst, scope.rst
│       │       ├── test_harness.rst, custom_backend.rst
│       └── src/
│           └── pymcaf/         # Python source
│               ├── __init__.py
│               ├── backend.py
│               ├── connection.py
│               ├── constants.py
│               ├── motor.py
│               ├── parameters.py
│               ├── scope.py
│               ├── test_harness.py
│               ├── types.py
│               └── backends/
│                   ├── __init__.py
│                   └── x2cscope.py
├── .github/workflows/
├── motorbench/                 # motorBench firmware reference
├── .cursor/rules/
└── .specstory/
```

---

## 2. Documentation Setup

**Tool:** Sphinx (no MkDocs).

**Relevant files:**

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `packages/pymcaf/docs/conf.py` | Sphinx config, extensions, theme |
| `packages/pymcaf/docs/index.rst` | Main docs index |
| `packages/pymcaf/docs/Makefile` | Build targets for `sphinx-build` |
| `packages/pymcaf/docs/make.bat` | Windows build script |

**conf.py highlights:**
- Extensions: `autodoc`, `napoleon`, `intersphinx`, `viewcode`
- Theme: `sphinx_rtd_theme`
- Intersphinx: `python`, `pyx2cscope`
- Napoleon for Google/NumPy docstrings

---

## 3. pyproject.toml

**pymcaf** (`packages/pymcaf/pyproject.toml`):

```toml
[project]
name = "pymcaf"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Python SDK for Microchip MCAF motor control firmware"
requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.13"
license = {text = "MIT"}
dependencies = [
    "pyx2cscope>=0.5.0",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
docs = [
    "sphinx>=7.0",
    "sphinx-rtd-theme>=2.0",
]

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]
```

**Root project** (`pyproject.toml`):

```toml
[project]
name = "mctoolbox"
version = "0.1.0"
dependencies = [
    "pymcaf>=0.1.0",
    "pyx2cscope>=0.5.0",
    "numpy>=1.26",
    "matplotlib>=3.7",
    "pyyaml>=6.0",
    "control>=0.10",
]
# Optional: notebook, dev
```

**Note:** No `setup.py` in the repo; both projects use `pyproject.toml`.

---

## 4. GitHub Actions Workflows

| File | Triggers | Purpose |
|------|----------|---------|
| `.github/workflows/docs.yml` | Push/PR to `main` when `packages/pymcaf/**` changes | Sphinx build, deploy to GitHub Pages |
| `.github/workflows/build.yml` | Push/PR to `main`, tags `v*` | Build mctoolbox for ubuntu/macos/windows (PyInstaller) and release artifacts |

**docs.yml** builds `packages/pymcaf/docs` and deploys to GitHub Pages on `main` only.

---

## 5. Git Remote

```
origin  git@github.com:gmrozek-mchp/pyx2ctune.git (fetch)
origin  git@github.com:gmrozek-mchp/pyx2ctune.git (push)
```

---

## 6. Python Modules in `src/pymcaf/`

| Module | Role |
|--------|------|
| `__init__.py` | Package root, exports public API |
| `backend.py` | Backend ABC |
| `connection.py` | Connection and ELF/parameters setup |
| `constants.py` | `GUARD_KEY_*`, `MOTOR_STATES`, enums |
| `motor.py` | Motor variables and PI gains |
| `parameters.py` | `ParameterDB`, `ParameterInfo` (Q-format) |
| `scope.py` | Scope capture |
| `test_harness.py` | Test harness, guard, operating modes |
| `types.py` | `DQPair`, `AlphaBetaPair`, `ABCTriple`, `MotorState` |
| `backends/__init__.py` | Backend subpackage |
| `backends/x2cscope.py` | pyX2Cscope backend implementation |

Public exports from `__init__.py`:

`Backend`, `Connection`, `Motor`, `TestHarness`, `ParameterDB`, `ParameterInfo`, `OperatingMode`, `ForceState`, `OverrideFlag`, `GUARD_KEY_*`, `MOTOR_STATES`, `ABCTriple`, `AlphaBetaPair`, `DQPair`, `MotorState`, `AsymmetricPerturbation`, `SquareWavePerturbation`.
